meta.title: Portfolio — Achille
meta.description: Full stack developer & designer. Web applications, clean code, and exceptional user experiences.

hero.title: Hi, I'm Achille
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer & Designer
hero.intro: I build beautiful, functional web applications that solve real problems. Passionate about clean code, intuitive design, and creating exceptional user experiences.

about.heading: About Me
about.p1: I'm a passionate developer with 5+ years of experience building modern web applications. I specialize in React, TypeScript, and Node.js, with a keen eye for design and user experience.
about.p2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or sharing knowledge through technical writing and mentorship.

items.title: E-Commerce Platform
items.description: A full-featured online store with payment integration, inventory management, and admin dashboard.

items.title: Task Management App
items.description: Collaborative project management tool with real-time updates and team collaboration features.

items.title: Weather Dashboard
items.description: Beautiful weather app with forecasts, interactive maps, and location-based alerts.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.body: I'm always interested in hearing about new projects and opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!
